resources:
No tracking requests were blocked from loading on this page. If a company\'s requests are loaded, it can allow them to profile you. DuckDuckGo can\'t load this page The internet connection appears to be offline. A server with the specified hostname could not be found. The certificate for this server is invalid. You might be connecting to a server that is pretending to be %1$s which could put your confidential information at risk. What site are you signing in to? (required) Site name (required) Could not access sound recorder Allow DuckDuckGo to ask for sound recorder access on this device Sites can only use the sound recorder if you allow DuckDuckGo to ask for access. Force Websites To Use Dark Theme Supported sites will use a darker theme when the app is in dark mode Relaunch app? This will take effect for new tabs or after relaunching DuckDuckGo. Relaunch Now Dismiss Downloads Settings DuckDuckGo Blocked in Indonesia The government may be blocking access to duckduckgo.com on this network provider, which could affect this app\'s functionality. Other providers may not be affected. Okay Skip Onboarding" Duck Player @string/duck_chat_title Free Plan Upgrade Duck.ai Android Design System Demo [{ \"relation\": [\"delegate_permission/common.handle_all_urls\"], \"target\": { \"namespace\": \"web\", \"site\": \"https://duckduckgo.com\" } }] Ready to get started?
Try a search or AI chat! Search privately Ask privately Explain the stock market like I\'m 10 Plan a perfect day in London Surprise me! What are 10 fascinating facts across science, nature, and history? That\'s Duck.ai! Private AI chats you can delete anytime with the Fire Button. Give it a try! 🔥 We noticed a change DuckDuckGo is no longer your default browser. Mind telling us why? Welcome back!
Want to customize anything? Set DuckDuckGo as default Add Home screen widget Address bar position Address bar search options Start Browsing Where do you want your address bar? You can make changes in Settings > Appearance. Want Search & AI chat in the address bar? Done Search Only Search & Duck.ai How to remove the Home screen widget Go to your Home screen Touch and hold the widget Tap or drag to remove it 1 2 3 Delete %1$d chat? Delete %1$d chats? Switch to Fire mode tabs Switch to regular tabs ∞ AI protections activated! Popular AIs All chats are anonymized No account needed to access all AI features Never uses your chats to train AI Access ChatGPT, Claude, and more, all in one place. Give Duck.ai a try! Start a private AI chat with Duck.ai or toggle to Search for protected browsing.

You can use Duck.ai from anywhere you see the chat icon We also offer a paid subscription featuring advanced AI models with higher chat limits from GPT, Claude, and Llama, a secure VPN, and more. Ready to chat privately with ChatGPT, Claude, and other AIs for free, in a browser that actively protects you? Want to make DuckDuckGo your default browser? Remember: you can use Duck.ai from anywhere you see the chat icon Start AI Chat
